Explore Topics Biosafety We support governments to manage the potential adverse effects and benefits of modern biotechnology, with a focus on protecting biological diversity and human health. Learn more about biosafety UNEP The Challenge Modern biotechnology can bring many benefits, but there are concerns that it could also have adverse impacts on biodiversity and human health.
